feed.title: Harshabrat - visualization
feed.subtitle: Hi 👋, I'm a CS student who enjoys exploring technology and learning new things. I share projects, write about what I'm currently working on, and occasionally blog about life and whatever happens to be on my mind.

entry.title: Visualizing Trends with Charts
entry.summary: A good chart answers a question at a glance. Before reaching for the most complex plot type, try a simple line or bar chart. Clarity beats decoration.
